description: Partial repair of the header-redirect/URL/metadata and expert-id defects flagged in the header-redirect-and-module-reconciliation correction. Bounded defects fixed and live-verified; the larger load-manifest, strict-index, committed-reconciliation-CLI, and source/package-identity items remain. Aggregate-only.

defects_fixed_this_cycle.defect_1_redirect_host_class: transport contract now returns (status,headers,body,final_url,redirect_chain); every hop incl. final must be HTTPS on a frozen permitted Hugging Face/CDN host set; intermediate downgrade or unpermitted host fails closed
defects_fixed_this_cycle.defect_2_exact_url_identity: request URL parsed with urllib.parse; exact scheme=https, permitted host, and exact path /{repo_id}/resolve/{revision}/{path}; credentials/query/fragment rejected; substring matching removed
defects_fixed_this_cycle.defect_3_metadata_commit_binding: the committed CLI requires HfApi.model_info(...).sha == the frozen revision before freezing descriptors
defects_fixed_this_cycle.defect_8_canonical_expert_ids: expert ids must be canonical decimal (0/00 no longer collapse); num_experts must be a positive non-boolean int; duplicate expert sub-modules and out-of-range ids fail closed

live_hardened_header_gate.note: the hardened CLI reran against the real artifact and passed the strict URL + redirect-chain + metadata-commit checks; reconciled 14 shards / 124611 tensors; embed/lm_head [248320,2048]; 0 payload bytes
live_hardened_header_gate.still_partial_because: defect 4 (strict weight-index identity + duplicate-key rejection + frozen grammar + local-bytes-vs-remote-identity verification) is NOT yet implemented; the CLI still parses the index with plain json.load

remaining_blockers.defect_4_strict_index_admission: freeze an exact descriptor for model.safetensors.index.json (repo/rev/path/blob-or-lfs-identity/size), verify local bytes vs the independent remote identity, reject duplicate JSON keys, and validate a frozen top-level + weight_map grammar (reject booleans, non-string names/paths, empty, traversal, unknown fields)
remaining_blockers.defect_6_committed_reconciliation_cli: a single committed CLI/adapter must reproduce the source<->artifact construction (source/package/class/config identity, meta-device module manifest, strict index parse, canonical artifact derivation, frozen map, equality) used identically in tests and live
remaining_blockers.defect_7_load_manifest_equality: coarse module-name equality is not load-manifest equality: exact tensor names/multiplicity, quantization aux tensors (scales/qzeros/g_idx/qweight), dtype/shape, expert-axis ordering, gate/up fusion order, packed layout, and the exact numbered->packed loader conversion with zero ignored/missing/synthesized tensors under strict loading
remaining_blockers.defect_9_schema_coverage: bind exact hidden-layer set + attention/DeltaNet/shared-expert/router/embed/head parameter schema to the pinned config
remaining_blockers.defect_10_source_package_identity: pin + equality-check the installed Transformers package, source file, class qualname, source digest/commit, config, and loader/conversion implementation before admitting the meta-device source set

privacy: aggregate-only; counts and booleans, no module names, tensor values, URLs, OIDs, weights, caches, or local paths
